title: Store Journal Entry v1
description: Append-only daily agent work journal entry. Prevents agent-over-agent overwrite and supports daily operational continuity across long-running headless agents.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was written

agent.description: The agent model or identity that performed the work (e.g. 'kilo-glm5', 'ubuntu-agent')

lane.description: The governance lane where work was performed

target.description: Short description of what this work targets

intent.description: What the agent intended to accomplish

files_read.description: Files the agent read during this session

forbidden_paths_touched.description: Whether agent touched any forbidden paths

receipts_created.description: Receipt paths created as proof of work

active_ownership.description: Currently owned paths that other agents must NOT overwrite

paths.description: File paths under active ownership (empty array = release all)

handoff.description: Handoff instructions for the next agent

status.description: Completion status of this work unit

next_action.description: What the next agent should do

do_not_overwrite.description: Files the next agent must NOT overwrite

_journal_id.description: Auto-generated unique ID for this journal entry

STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_4: Every sudo command writes sudo_action event.
STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_5: Every test run writes test_result event.
STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_7: Before editing, agents must check today's journal for active ownership.
STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_8: If another agent owns the path, do not edit. Create a proposal instead.
STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_9: Journal is append-only. Do not rewrite old entries.
STORE_JOURNAL_POLICY_v1.rule_10: Daily summary is generated from JSONL, not hand-edited as truth.
